title: Jinx: Alchemist / Boffin
description: If the Alchemist has the Boffin ability, the Alchemist does not learn what ability the Demon has.

title: Jinx: Alchemist / Marionette
description: An Alchemist-Marionette has no Marionette ability & the Marionette is in play.

title: Jinx: Alchemist / Mastermind
description: An Alchemist-Mastermind has no Mastermind ability & the Mastermind is not-in-play.

title: Jinx: Alchemist / Organ Grinder
description: If the Alchemist has the Organ Grinder ability, the Organ Grinder is in play. If both are sober, both are drunk.

title: Jinx: Alchemist / Spy
description: An Alchemist-Spy has no Spy ability & a Spy is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Spy may publicly guess a living player as the Spy. If correct, the Demon must choose the Spy tonight.

title: Jinx: Alchemist / Summoner
description: The Alchemist-Summoner does not get bluffs, and chooses which Demon but not which player. If they die before this happens, evil wins. [No Demon]

title: Jinx: Alchemist / Wraith
description: An Alchemist-Wraith has no Wraith ability & a Wraith is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Wraith may publicly guess a living player as the Wraith. If correct, the Demon must choose the Wraith tonight.

title: Jinx: Alchemist / Widow
description: An Alchemist-Widow has no Widow ability & a Widow is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Widow may publicly guess a living player as the Widow. If correct, the Demon must choose the Widow tonight.

title: Jinx: Bounty Hunter / Kazali
description: If the Kazali turns the Bounty Hunter into a Minion, an evil Townsfolk is not created.

title: Jinx: Bounty Hunter / Philosopher
description: If the Philosopher gains the Bounty Hunter ability, a Townsfolk might turn evil.

title: Jinx: Cannibal / Butler
description: If the Cannibal gains the Butler ability, the Cannibal learns this.

title: Jinx: Cannibal / Juggler
description: If the Juggler guesses on their first day and dies by execution, tonight the living Cannibal learns how many guesses the Juggler got correct.

title: Jinx: Cannibal / Princess
description: If the Cannibal nominated, executed, & killed the Princess today, the Demon doesn't kill tonight.

title: Jinx: Cannibal / Zealot
description: If the Cannibal gains the Zealot ability, the Cannibal learns this.

title: Jinx: Mathematician / Chambermaid
description: The Chambermaid can detect if the Mathematician will wake tonight.

title: Jinx: Mathematician / Drunk
description: The Mathematician might learn if the Drunk's ability yielded false info or failed to work properly.

title: Jinx: Mathematician / Lunatic
description: The Mathematician might learn if the Lunatic attacks a different player than the real Demon attacked.

title: Jinx: Mathematician / Marionette
description: The Mathematician might learn if the Marionette's ability yielded false info or failed to work properly.

title: Jinx: Magician / Legion
description: The Magician wakes with Legion and might register as evil. Legion knows if a Magician is in play, but not which player it is.

title: Jinx: Magician / Marionette
description: If the Magician is alive, the Demon doesn't know which neighbor is the Marionette.

title: Jinx: Magician / Spy
description: When the Spy sees the Grimoire, the Demon and Magician's character tokens are removed.

title: Jinx: Magician / Vizier
description: If the Vizier is in play, the Magician has no ability but is immune to the Vizier's ability.

title: Jinx: Magician / Widow
description: When the Widow sees the Grimoire, the Demon and Magician's character tokens are removed.

title: Jinx: Magician / Wraith
description: After each execution, the living Magician may publicly guess a living player as the Wraith. If correct, the Demon must choose the Wraith tonight.

title: Jinx: Butler / Organ Grinder
description: If the Organ Grinder is causing eyes closed voting, the Butler may raise their hand to vote but their vote is only counted if their master voted too.

title: Jinx: Heretic / Baron
description: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

title: Jinx: Heretic / Godfather
description: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

title: Jinx: Heretic / Lleech
description: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

title: Jinx: Heretic / Pit-Hag
description: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

title: Jinx: Heretic / Spy
description: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

title: Jinx: Heretic / Widow
description: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

title: Jinx: Plague Doctor / Baron
description: If the Storyteller would gain the Baron ability, up to two players become Outsiders.

title: Jinx: Plague Doctor / Boomdandy
description: If the Storyteller would gain the Boomdandy ability, a player becomes the Boomdandy.

title: Jinx: Plague Doctor / Evil Twin
description: If the Storyteller would gain the Evil Twin ability, a player becomes the Evil Twin.

title: Jinx: Plague Doctor / Fearmonger
description: If the Storyteller would gain the Fearmonger ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.

title: Jinx: Plague Doctor / Goblin
description: If the Storyteller would gain the Goblin ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.

title: Jinx: Plague Doctor / Marionette
description: If the Storyteller would gain the Marionette ability, one of the Demon's good neighbors becomes the Marionette.

title: Jinx: Plague Doctor / Scarlet Woman
description: If the Storyteller would gain the Scarlet Woman ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.

title: Jinx: Plague Doctor / Spy
description: If the Storyteller would gain the Spy ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.

title: Jinx: Plague Doctor / Wraith
description: If the Storyteller would gain the Wraith ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.

title: Jinx: Recluse / Ogre
description: If the Recluse registers as evil to the Ogre, the Ogre learns that they are evil.

title: Jinx: Recluse / Sage
description: The Recluse might register as the Demon to the Sage.

title: Jinx: Boffin / Cult Leader
description: If the Demon has the Cult Leader ability, they can't turn good due to this ability.

title: Jinx: Boffin / Drunk
description: The Demon cannot have the Drunk ability.

title: Jinx: Boffin / Goon
description: If the Demon has the Goon ability, they can't turn good due to this ability.

title: Jinx: Boffin / Heretic
description: The Demon cannot have the Heretic ability.

title: Jinx: Boffin / Ogre
description: The Demon cannot have the Ogre ability.

title: Jinx: Boffin / Politician
description: The Demon cannot have the Politician ability.

title: Jinx: Boffin / Village Idiot
description: If there is a spare token, the Boffin can give the Demon the Village Idiot ability.

title: Jinx: Cerenovus / Goblin
description: The Cerenovus may choose to make a player mad that they are the Goblin.

title: Jinx: Marionette / Balloonist
description: If the Marionette thinks that they are the Balloonist, an Outsider might have been added during setup.

title: Jinx: Marionette / Huntsman
description: If the Marionette thinks that they are the Huntsman, the Damsel was added during setup.

title: Jinx: Marionette / Kazali
description: If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.

title: Jinx: Marionette / Lil' Monsta
description: If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.

title: Jinx: Marionette / Summoner
description: If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.

title: Jinx: Mastermind / Vigormortis
description: A Mastermind that has their ability keeps it if the Vigormortis dies.

title: Jinx: Pit-Hag / Cult Leader
description: If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Cult Leader, they can't turn good due to their own ability.

title: Jinx: Pit-Hag / Damsel
description: If a Pit-Hag creates a Damsel, the Storyteller chooses which player it is.

title: Jinx: Pit-Hag / Goon
description: If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Goon, they can't turn good due to their own ability.

title: Jinx: Pit-Hag / Ogre
description: If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Ogre, they can't turn good due to their own ability.

title: Jinx: Pit-Hag / Politician
description: If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Politician, they can't turn good due to their own ability.

title: Jinx: Pit-Hag / Village Idiot
description: If there is a spare token, the Pit-Hag can create an extra Village Idiot. If so, the drunk Village Idiot might change.

title: Jinx: Scarlet Woman / Al-Hadikhia
description: If there would be two Demons, one of which was the Scarlet Woman, the Scarlet Woman becomes the Scarlet Woman again.

title: Jinx: Scarlet Woman / Fang Gu
description: If there would be two Demons, one of which was the Scarlet Woman, the Scarlet Woman remains the Scarlet Woman.

title: Jinx: Spy / Damsel
description: If the Spy is (or has been) in play, the Damsel is poisoned.

title: Jinx: Spy / Ogre
description: The Spy registers as evil to the Ogre.

title: Jinx: Spy / Poppy Grower
description: If the Poppy Grower has their ability, the Spy does not see the Grimoire.

title: Jinx: Summoner / Clockmaker
description: The Summoner registers as the Demon to the Clockmaker.

title: Jinx: Summoner / Courtier
description: If the living Summoner has no ability, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.

title: Jinx: Summoner / Engineer
description: If the living Summoner is removed from play, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.

title: Jinx: Summoner / Hatter
description: If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.

title: Jinx: Summoner / Kazali
description: If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.

title: Jinx: Summoner / Lord of Typhon
description: If a Lord of Typhon is summoned, they must neighbor a Minion & their other neighbor becomes an evil Minion.

title: Jinx: Summoner / Pit-Hag
description: If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.

title: Jinx: Summoner / Poppy Grower
description: If the Poppy Grower is alive on the 3rd night, the Summoner chooses which Demon but not which player.

title: Jinx: Summoner / Preacher
description: If the living Summoner has no ability, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.

title: Jinx: Summoner / Pukka
description: The Summoner may summon a Pukka on the 2nd night instead of the 3rd.

title: Jinx: Summoner / Zombuul
description: If the Summoner summons a dead player into the Zombuul, the Zombuul has already "died once".

title: Jinx: Vizier / Alsaahir
description: The Storyteller doesn't declare the Vizier is in play.

title: Jinx: Vizier / Courtier
description: If the Vizier loses their ability, they learn this, and cannot die during the day.

title: Jinx: Vizier / Fearmonger
description: The Vizier wakes with the Fearmonger, learns who they choose and cannot choose to immediately execute that player.

title: Jinx: Vizier / Investigator
description: The Storyteller doesn't declare the Vizier is in play.

title: Jinx: Vizier / Politician
description: The Politician might register as evil to the Vizier.

title: Jinx: Vizier / Preacher
description: If the Vizier loses their ability, they learn this, and cannot die during the day.

title: Jinx: Vizier / Zealot
description: The Zealot might register as evil to the Vizier.

title: Jinx: Widow / Damsel
description: If the Widow is (or has been) in play, the Damsel is poisoned.

title: Jinx: Widow / Poppy Grower
description: If the Poppy Grower has their ability, the Widow does not see the Grimoire.

title: Jinx: Al-Hadikhia / Princess
description: If the Princess nominated & executed a player on their 1st day, no one dies to the Al-Hadikhia tonight.

title: Jinx: Al-Hadikhia / Mastermind
description: If the Al-Hadikhia dies by execution, and the Mastermind is alive, the Al-Hadikhia chooses 3 good players tonight: if all 3 choose to live, evil wins. Otherwise, good wins.

title: Jinx: Legion / Engineer
description: If Legion is created, all evil players become Legion. If Legion is in play, the Engineer starts knowing this but has no ability.

title: Jinx: Legion / Hatter
description: If Legion is created, all evil players become Legion. If Legion is in play, the Hatter has no ability.

title: Jinx: Legion / Minstrel
description: If Legion died by execution today, Legion keeps their ability, but the Minstrel might learn they are Legion.

title: Jinx: Legion / Politician
description: The Politician might register as evil to Legion.

title: Jinx: Legion / Preacher
description: If the Preacher chooses Legion, Legion keeps their ability, but the Preacher might learn they are Legion.

title: Jinx: Legion / Summoner
description: If Legion is summoned, all evil players become Legion.

title: Jinx: Legion / Zealot
description: The Zealot might register as evil to Legion.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / Banshee
description: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Banshee dies & gains their ability.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / Exorcist
description: If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Exorcist-chosen player, good wins.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / Farmer
description: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Farmer uses their ability but does not die.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / Grandmother
description: If the Leviathan is in play and the Grandchild dies by execution, evil wins.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / Hatter
description: The Leviathan cannot enter play after day 5.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / Innkeeper
description: If the Leviathan nominates and executes an Innkeeper-protected player, good wins.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / King
description: If the Leviathan is in play, and at least 1 player is dead, the King learns an alive character each night.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / Mayor
description: If the Leviathan and the Mayor are alive on day 5 & no execution occurs, good wins.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / Monk
description: If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Monk-protected player, good wins.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / Pit-Hag
description: The Leviathan cannot enter play after day 5.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / Ravenkeeper
description: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive player (different to previous nights): a chosen Ravenkeeper uses their ability but does not die.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / Sage
description: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Sage uses their ability but does not die.

title: Jinx: Leviathan / Soldier
description: If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Soldier, good wins.

title: Jinx: Lil' Monsta / Hatter
description: If the Hatter dies & the Demon chooses Lil' Monsta, they also choose a Minion to become.

title: Jinx: Lil' Monsta / Poppy Grower
description: If Lil' Monsta & the Poppy Grower are alive, Minions wake one by one, until one of them chooses to take the Lil' Monsta token.

title: Jinx: Lil' Monsta / Psychopath
description: If the Psychopath is babysitting Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.

title: Jinx: Lil' Monsta / Magician
description: If the Magician is alive, the Storyteller chooses which Minion babysits Lil' Monsta.

title: Jinx: Lil' Monsta / Scarlet Woman
description: If Lil' Monsta dies with 5 or more players alive, the Scarlet Woman babysits Lil' Monsta for the rest of the game.

title: Jinx: Lil' Monsta / Vizier
description: If the Vizier is babysitting Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.

title: Jinx: Lleech / Mastermind
description: If the Mastermind is alive and the Lleech host dies by execution, the Lleech lives but loses their ability.

title: Jinx: Lleech / Slayer
description: If the Slayer slays the Lleech host, the host dies.

title: Jinx: Riot / Atheist
description: During a riot, if the Storyteller is nominated, players vote. If they are "about to die", the game ends. If not, they nominate again.

title: Jinx: Riot / Banshee
description: Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Banshee dies & gains their ability.

title: Jinx: Riot / Exorcist
description: If Riot nominates and executes the Exorcist-chosen player, good wins.

title: Jinx: Riot / Farmer
description: Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Farmer uses their ability but does not die.

title: Jinx: Riot / Grandmother
description: If Riot is in play and the Grandchild dies by execution, evil wins.

title: Jinx: Riot / Innkeeper
description: If Riot nominates and executes an Innkeeper-protected player, good wins.

title: Jinx: Riot / King
description: If Riot is in play, and at least 1 player is dead, the King learns an alive character each night.

title: Jinx: Riot / Mayor
description: The Mayor may choose to stop the riot. If they do so when only 1 Riot is alive, good wins. Otherwise, evil wins.

title: Jinx: Riot / Monk
description: If Riot nominates and executes the Monk-protected player, good wins.

title: Jinx: Riot / Ravenkeeper
description: Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Ravenkeeper uses their ability but does not die.

title: Jinx: Riot / Sage
description: Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Sage uses their ability but does not die.

title: Jinx: Riot / Soldier
description: If Riot nominates and executes the Soldier, good wins.

title: Jinx: Vortox / Banshee
description: If the Vortox kills the Banshee, all players learn that the Banshee has died.

title: Jinx: Yaggababble / Exorcist
description: If the Exorcist chooses the Yaggababble, the Yaggababble does not kill tonight.
